title: capture-buffer.intention_edit
description: T20:capture-buffer intention_edit event (WS-321 Phase B + Phase E). Emitted by /session-start Step 0c when intention.md non-comment content hash changes. Drives the placeholder->content detection that triggers the optional 'run /intend' nudge.

old_hash.description: Previous SHA-256 of intention.md non-comment content

new_hash.description: Current SHA-256 of intention.md non-comment content

changed_sections.description: Best-effort list of intention.md sections that changed (Imagined Outcome, Principles, Softgoals, Anti-goals, Open Questions)
